info.title: Hivelight
info.description: Hivelight is a legal practice management platform that helps teams organise work and collaborate efficiently. Use this connector to create, update, and manage matters, tasks, workflows, users, and workspaces within Hivelight, enabling automated legal operations and streamlined processes.

get.description: Get all matters the current user has access to in a workspace.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Starting index for pagination.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of items to return.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Filter matters by archived status.

parameters.name: userIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated user IDs to filter matters by participants.

post.description: Create a new matter and optionally apply workflows to it.

parameters.name: body

workflows.description: Workflows to apply to this matter.

startDate.description: Start date as milliseconds since Unix epoch.

parameters.description: The matter data to create.

get.description: Get details of a specific matter by ID.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

post.description: Update the details of an existing matter.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The matter data to update.

delete.description: Delete a matter. Only archived matters can be deleted. This operation is irreversible.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

post.description: Apply a workflow (roadmap or task list) to a matter.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow to apply.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date as milliseconds since Unix epoch.

parameters.name: milestoneId
parameters.description: Milestone ID to apply a task list to (defaults to general tasks).

post.description: Update roles for a matter. This replaces existing roles with the provided values.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The roles data to update.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

post.description: Create a note on a matter.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

parameters.name: body

content.description: Content of the note in text or HTML.

parameters.description: The note data to create.

post.description: Create a note on a task within a matter.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the matter.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task.

parameters.name: body

content.description: Content of the note in text or HTML.

parameters.description: The note data to create.

get.description: Get all users in the workspace.
Get a specific user by ID. Use 'whoami' to get the current user's details.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID or 'whoami' for current user.

get.description: Get tasks in the workspace with optional pagination and filtering.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Starting index for pagination.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of items to return.

parameters.name: matterId
parameters.description: Filter tasks by matter.

parameters.name: milestoneId
parameters.description: Filter tasks by milestone.

parameters.name: dueDateFrom
parameters.description: Tasks with due date after this value (ms since epoch).

parameters.name: dueDateTo
parameters.description: Tasks with due date before this value (ms since epoch).

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Comma-separated statuses: TODO, INPROGRESS, INREVIEW, DONE.

get.description: Get details of a specific task.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task.

post.description: Update the status of a task.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The status data to update.

get.description: Retrieve all webhooks for the current workspace.

post.description: Create a new webhook for the current workspace.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The webhook data to create.

get.description: Retrieve a webhook by its ID.

parameters.name: webhookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

delete.description: Delete a webhook by its ID.

parameters.name: webhookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

post.description: Triggers when a new matter is created in Hivelight.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The webhook registration payload.

post.description: Triggers when a new task is created within a matter.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The webhook registration payload.

post.summary: When a Task Status is Updated
post.description: Triggers when the status of a task is updated.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The webhook registration payload.

post.description: Triggers when a new milestone is created.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The webhook registration payload.

post.summary: When a Milestone Status is Updated
post.description: Triggers when the status of a milestone is updated.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The webhook registration payload.

get.description: Fetch a list of workflows for the workspace.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Starting point for pagination.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of workflows to return.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type: ROADMAP (default) or TASK_LIST.

get.description: Fetch details of a specific workflow by ID.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow.

get.description: Retrieve the current workspace along with its related matter types.

MatterRoles.description: Roles and users associated with the matter.

isPriority.description: Whether the task is a priority.
